pull_requests.title: feat: Native authentication screen with biometrics
pull_requests.description: Building a fully native login screen with Face ID and fingerprint support. Handles JWT token storage in secure keychain. Does NOT use the backend auth gateway — connects directly to the auth service.

pull_requests.title: feat: Payment v2 integration with REST API
pull_requests.description: Integrates with the backend REST payment endpoints for v2. Uses /api/v1/payments/* for all transaction operations. Critical path for the v2 release.

pull_requests.title: feat: Client-side notification deduplication
pull_requests.description: Adds a local cache layer to filter duplicate push notifications before displaying them.

pull_requests.title: feat: 5-step onboarding flow
pull_requests.description: Implements the complete 5-step onboarding: 1) Email verification, 2) Profile setup, 3) Preferences, 4) Tutorial, 5) Welcome screen.
